Our Story

About Us

FullTimeCEO is not only a lifestyle, but it is also a mindset — one that signifies and identifies with the person or persons kicking ass and taking names in the name of business, guidance, and community.

The name is not to evoke a sense of working twenty-four hours a day, seven days a week. It is to promote the understanding that ownership, agency and awareness of self is a full time growth-project and we should all be striving for that — Full Time.
